basics.name: Michael Zhang
basics.label: Senior Full Stack Drupal Developer
basics.phoneNote: TODO: recommend OMITTING phone from the public site — keep it in the PDF only
basics.summary: Senior Full Stack Drupal Developer with 10+ years delivering Australian government digital transformation. Specialist in Drupal 9/10/11, GovCMS, headless CMS, React and GraphQL — now integrating AI-augmented engineering (LLM APIs, agentic coding workflows) into every stage of delivery.

links.label: Drupal.org
links.url: TODO: add drupal.org profile if you have one — strong signal for Drupal roles

aiTransition.heading: AI Lab
aiTransition.intro: Michael treats AI as an engineering discipline, not a buzzword. Over the past year Michael has moved his entire development workflow to agentic tooling — writing executable specifications that AI agents implement autonomously — and started shipping LLM-powered products end to end. The goal: bring the same rigour Michael applies to government Drupal delivery into AI-augmented engineering.
